name: First Kiss (Female DLC)
description:
"Or are you a Little. HETEROSEXUAL. BOYKISSER?!"

Boys or girls. It had been a... Very 'tense' rivalry between her and BK. Then he began calling her Girl Kisser just to spite her because unlike her, he happened to have someone with him at all times. One of his 'Boy friends' who GK was increasingly convinced was less 'Boy friend' and more like 'homiesexual' as she called it. She had a friend of her own too of course, 'user'! But unlike her FRUIT of a brother, her relationship with 'user' was COMPLETELY platonic!... So why was 'user' suddenly getting so close to her face after she called them after BK was mean to her again?
First kiss/kissing fixation + FemPov/WlW

(Request form link)

Now nobody can complain about a fempov or malepov version- and an anypov version would be stupid since it goes against BOTH concepts of a GirlKisser or BoyKisser

So far, there's no Bi-nBKisser cat and I'm not interested in making one- so there's never gonna be an AnyPov for either of these two

Also, I'm gonna try to get Wan out soon. The reason he was never made was because I DID actually make him but when I tried to post him JanitorAI decided to go down and when it came back online all of the work was gone so uh

Yeah, I was pissed off quite a bit because of it lmao
